{{- /* Accelerator pill: {{< accel nvidia >}} {{< accel amd >}} {{< accel tpu >}} {{< accel trainium >}} {{< accel ascend >}}. Logo is monochrome and follows the theme via CSS; unknown keys render as a text-only pill. */ -}} {{- $key := (.Get 0) | lower -}} {{- $logos := dict "nvidia" "/img/logos/nvidia.svg" "amd" "/img/logos/amd.svg" "tpu" "/img/logos/googlecloud.svg" "trainium" "/img/logos/amazonaws.svg" -}} {{- $labels := dict "nvidia" "NVIDIA" "amd" "AMD" "tpu" "TPU" "trainium" "Trainium" "ascend" "Ascend" -}} {{- $logo := index $logos $key -}} {{- $label := index $labels $key | default (.Get 0) -}} {{- with $logo -}}{{ $label }}{{- else -}}{{ $label }}{{- end -}}
